# First Solar — ADC Primary Solar Partner

## Company
- **HQ**: Tempe, Arizona
- **LA Factory**: 1400 Corporate Drive, New Iberia, LA ($1.1B, 2.4M sq ft)
- **Output**: 3.5 GW/year — Series 7 thin-film CdTe modules
- **Website**: firstsolar.com
- **Contact**: Info@FirstSolar.com | 419-662-6899

## Why First Solar
- 30 miles from Trappeys — panels manufactured next door
- $1.1B invested in Louisiana already
- ZERO Chinese supply chain (American glass, steel, fabrication)
- Deep investor network (billion-dollar backers who want solar on everything)
- Mutual interest: they want panels deployed, we need Layer 1 power
- Government funding aligned on both sides (30% ITC + state incentives)

## ADC Solar Roadmap
| Phase | Site | Capacity | Panels |
|-------|------|----------|--------|
| 1 | Trappeys Cannery (rooftop) | ~1 MW | 1,830 |
| 2 | Willow Glen (ground-mount) | 30+ MW | TBD |
| 3 | Every ADC site | Scales with footprint | TBD |

## This Folder
Drop spec sheets, proposals, correspondence, and technical docs here.
Subfolders:
- `spec-sheets/` — Panel specs, datasheets, installation guides
- `proposals/` — Quotes, project proposals, site surveys
- `correspondence/` — Emails, meeting notes, agreements
